articles.title: Iranian official says breaches of deal with US will 'receive an even harder slap'
articles.summary: Iranian official says breaches of deal with US will 'receive an even harder slap' Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf warned that if there are breaches of the peace deal with the US, Iran will not hesitate to respond. "In the event of bad faith, breach of contract, and excessive demands by the opposing side, we have no hesitation in delivering a crushing response to the enemy," he said in a post on X.  "They were once slapped during the war; if they wish to tread that path again, they will receive an even harder slap."
